violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Cases of hood items stored directly on the floor in walk-in coolers.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Stainless steel bowl on drainboard, draining directly on a towel. - Provide a drain/wire rack or cleanable matting to allow are drying - not on an absorbent surface.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Front handwash sink was used for purpose other than handwashing. - storing a pan of ice cream scoops. ** Corrected during inspection.
